design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Unreleased port of Turrican II designed by The Code Monkeys; represents an alternate vision for SNES that was superseded by Super Turrican. Described as 'bastardized' adaptation, suggesting significant departures from source material conventions.

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor: Universal Soldier (SNES) article

metadata.note: Game was never completed or publicly released. Available source documents only technical/archival content (unused music, development credits) with no gameplay mechanics, difficulty design, progression systems, or narrative delivery data. Comprehensive design analysis not possible from available documentation.
